title: Application Support Analyst
description:
• Responsible for managing a team and engage in day-to-day support activities including incident and problem management.
  • Perform production deployments, patch activities on the supported applications and servers.
  • Work with product support/development team for permanent resolution/change review – all types including enhancements, bug fixes, etc.
  • Work with level 1 support in application knowledge transfer in establishing standard first level recovery process/system health check monitoring/scheduled activities as well as common application user queries.
  • Collaborate with internal stakeholders like application, business, infrastructure, security, and operations to continuously improve the stability of applications.
  • Develop support operational documents to summarize common support issues.
  • Develop reports and drive audit RFI’s and requirements.
  • Develop Linux scripts based on the requirements.
  • Provide after office hours’ standby support and for emergency recoveries, including managing major incident of critical services.
  • Expected to drive improvements through influence and strong relationships with managers in other teams.
  • Correlate events across multiple systems to proactively surface and resolve deep, underlying issues.

Job Requirements:

  • Bachelors’ Degree in Computer Science or related field.
  • At least 6 years’ relevant experience preferably in a Finance Institution.
  • Strong working knowledge on Oracle Identity Governance 12c, Oracle Database, WebLogic, BI Publisher, Oracle Connectors, Linux, Unix & Windows Enterprise Server OS, with mixed skills around administration, performance tuning and troubleshooting
  • Working knowledge of Python, java, Java Scripts,
  • Knowledge in network infrastructure like Load balancers, Firewalls, SSL etc
  • Working Knowledge on Directory - LDAP and AD Databases
  • Strong knowledge of Oracle SQL and proficient in writing complex SQL queries with hands on experience with reporting tools along with excellent computational ability.
  • Effective communication skills, requires excellent stakeholder management skills, has ability to multitask effectively and need to be a good team player.
  • Work independently with minimal to no supervision.

postedCompany.description:
D L Resources Pte Ltd, established on 5 January 1996, is a Singapore-based Information Technology and Human Capital Services provider. We specialize in delivering end-to-end IT professional services and agency-employed contract staffing solutions to a diverse client base, including leading banks, financial institutions, and multinational corporations.


EA License No: 24C2333
